insights.text: 📊 Your dataset contains 862 rows and 64 columns. After cleaning, 862 rows were retained (100.0% of the original data).

⚠️ Columns 'mpn' (53.1%), 'upc' (76.7%), 'wasPrice' (79.2%) have a high percentage of missing values (>30%). These were filled using the most common value, but you may want to double-check these columns.
🔧 Columns 'sold', 'available', 'sell_through_rate' had moderate missing data (10–30%). Numeric columns were filled with the median value, and text columns with the most frequent value.

🔧 'seller_city' had 7.4% missing values filled using mode; 'seller_state' had 7.4% missing values filled using mode; 'seller_country' had 7.4% missing values filled using mode; 'global_reach_score' had 7.4% missing values filled using grouped_median (by primary_category).
✅ No duplicate rows detected. Each record in your dataset is unique.
🔗 A strong positive correlation (0.95) was found between 'has_local_storage' and 'is_nvr_dvr_system'. As 'has_local_storage' increases, 'is_nvr_dvr_system' tends to increase as well.
🔗 A strong negative correlation (-0.92) was found between 'global_reach_score' and 'is_us_only_shipping'. As 'global_reach_score' increases, 'is_us_only_shipping' tends to decrease as well.
🔗 A strong positive correlation (0.89) was found between 'available' and 'sqrt_available'. As 'available' increases, 'sqrt_available' tends to increase as well.
📈 Column 'condition_score' failed the Shapiro-Wilk normality test and is left-skewed (negatively skewed). The mean (4.4524) is lower than the median (5.0), suggesting extreme values pull the average.
📈 Column 'price' failed the Shapiro-Wilk normality test and is right-skewed (positively skewed). The mean (117.1183) is higher than the median (73.13), suggesting extreme values pull the average.

🎯 Mutual Information analysis shows 'log_revenue_proxy' shares the most non-linear information (normalized score: 1.000) with the dataset's highest variance column, followed by 'log_sold' (score: 0.269). These columns contain the most unique signal.
🏷️ Column 'title' has 845 unique categories. The most common value is '4-Pack Wireless 5G WiFi Security Camera System Smart Outdoor Night Vision 1080P', appearing in 0.5% of records (4 times).
🏷️ Column 'brand' has 206 unique categories. The most common value is 'Unknown', appearing in 14.5% of records (125 times).
🟢 Overall Data Quality Score: 86/100 — Excellent. Your dataset is in great shape for analysis.
